name: Mainframe Segment Transform Pipeline
description: Reads CDP BigQuery tables via SQL query and produces fixed-width mainframe segment files in GCS. Template-driven: each segment (Customer, CreditCard, CheckDebitCard, Loans, Savings) is defined by a YAML template specifying the SQL query and output field layout.

parameters.name: extract_month
parameters.label: Extract month
parameters.helpText: Extract month in YYYYMM format. Resolves {period_start} and {period_end} in SQL. Defaults to month of extract_date if omitted.

parameters.name: output_bucket
parameters.label: Output GCS bucket
parameters.helpText: GCS bucket name for fixed-width segment output files.

parameters.name: run_id
parameters.label: Pipeline run ID
parameters.helpText: Unique identifier for this pipeline run.

parameters.name: gcp_project
parameters.label: GCP Project ID
parameters.helpText: GCP project ID for BigQuery source tables and job control.
